From start to finish, Bill was great to work with.  He is 100% reliable, and did everything he said he would do.  Bill and his team did a 1st class job of re-shingling my roof.  I could not be happier with the excellent quality of their work and I have no hesitation whatsoever in highly recommending Sam (Bill) Bowers Roofing.   You won’t (cannot!) go wrong selecting Sam Bowers Roofing.

title: Feeney Roofing INC

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Sarah Mourning","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWGRCgRh2vULDODhWdZE5cuX9JcCosS1YzLjehKAf5gPFSis99k=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The roofers did a great job. The job did drag out from a few days to a week. But the roof looks good.
Issues:
-Left half a pound of nails around the yard.
-They came back and picked up most
-After the cleanup I still found more nails under my truck. I was actually parked on a strip of 3" Pneumatic nails.
-They fell through the garage roof. I'm not sure how but they fixed that.
-We had them back to fix the Eaves trough after I hounded them.
-The down spouts drained right into the basement.
They installed ends to bring the water away after we called them      back.
-One of the elbows & down pipes were installed improperly with the down pipe not sloping downward but upward toward the roof.
The water was pouring out at that joint.

They removed the squirrel egress cage from the roof then didn't seal the hole. This was the trough guys!!
they left the troughs off while gone for a day & the hole was left open after the job was completed!  The Squirrels got back in.. Now they wont get back to us about hiring back the exterminators!
So now we have to deal with pest control again!!! "900.00"

All in all disappointed.
To be fair though, you can expect the same from most companies now. Standards are below grade now.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jake Dow","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLqJbsU7fghlR8dfJv3gUsV0HHubNX5bxxOuauoXO3eJ8bHRw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"My house burnt down in a fire, Feeny roofing was in charge of doing my siding. They messed up my siding everywhere, pieces flying off with any type of wind. then when I phoned to complain they said I was their first priority and they would get at it right away. Long story short, I had to phone them a dozen times over the course of almost A YEAR!!!! There was no communication and the company just kept having nothing to say. When they finally showed up it was out of no where and with no warning. this company is a joke and I don't know how they function like this..... pathetic.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rick Barfitt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKZma7EXOcrNYuwYoYAJvzyBr0uExiiJIcv3tWIAZSSng13gQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our experience with the professionals at Feeney was outstanding. They responded in a couple of days and dealt with an unusual situation I was left with. Steve, Kelly and Scott, thank you so much for the great work. I had the opportunity to visit their operation in Peterborough and could tell from the time I set foot in their office that I was in good hands. If you have Roofing, Siding, Exterior Repairs or Replacement, etc., I strongly recommend this very well organized and longtime established professional company.
Thank you Feeney Roofing!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Scott Parkin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX-4qe2AQqjkDCcBjVHjMGHkLi0WcnhIJ2eh4J3aFUpERsfMjua=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had ice storm damage to our cottage and although not devastating it required partial replacement. Nathan and his crew were in and out in less than one day. The colour match of the shingles was ideal and George did a final magnet search for nails when he picked up the bin. The work was completed in a professional and timely manner.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Paula Armour","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKyFLMFyiidEFFTGmvHBAdNEB7gNWDsMn3VWXsaowTh2bGtSA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I highly recommend Feeney Roofing. From office staff, Corey with his drone technology, Scott and Darren with their pleasant professional, and meticulous attention to detail, the entire roofing job was completed in a timely fashion with no disruption to my own routine. When they left, no sign remained that they had been here. And, hey, the price was less than their competitors!! It just doesn't get any better.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Robert Warren","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKsIjT1U3s5IVXZz1-pAMOZY_yPymF9bX5wuaX9Rci-Pmqpyw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Yesterday, in the late afternoon, an arborist discovered a 4 inch hole in our roof, made by an earlier fallen tree branch. The hole was right over our bedroom! After 5 weeks of drought, heavy overnight rain was forecast to start at 7:00 P.M!
Anticipating a ruined bedroom ceiling, I called Feeney Roofing and asked a very understanding Paula for help... before the storm, if possible. She expedited my plea for help and a very able and well-spoken young man called Nathan showed up before the storm.  He made an excellent repair that saved our bedroom ceiling, because it did rain all night!
Feeney Roofing saved us both a lot of ceiling repair money and a bad night!. Just two more reasons why my wife and I have been using Feeney Roofing for over 20 years.
- Robert Warren, City of Kawartha Lakes","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Andrea Green","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJTuDrwYmJka-j5mvmFCzUp--MzJA_Nvwwwz9vT8n-EisutHw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"After several phone calls were made to get someone to look at the job, a person showed up and gave a quote. When we agreed to the quote via email there was no response. Emailed again and no response. Going to go with a more reliable company","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nicholas Tutton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXQtTqDZ6Jv6uD-abj45ZyXuFj2TTniyfNSm2UGtkUZIQW3OT9G6Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This company is amazing. Professional crew quock response time. Roof was done in one day. Large crew sent to my home woth on a week of booking. Could not be hapier.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Joe Baldwin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJVvO1FqPpiqd9FMFWUruoRXzglnwibb-x6Pu9eLCHldHPnDQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Had my roof shoveled cause of an Ice Damm

They came shoveled the roof and cleaned up no complaints there. Was told my leak should stop now and paid way over market value found out neighbors were paying less then half what I paid for exact same roof... but my fault not checking other places that had same insurance in place.

Fast forward two weeks roof started leaking in exact same spot. Called and texted company got ghosted till I made a comment on one of their adds.

Paid a second company to come up told that original should have made a valley in Damm for water to travel off roof which the second company did. No more leaks.

Would not hire Jacks roofing again they charge 100% more then anyone paid in my area and did not fix the initial problem I paid them too do. And got a snooty response back finally that I didn't even bother responding too...","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dave Van Kerrebroeck","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXtv9hEKBsPl12y2A-SvusCpjJDLKWi2PA_sFJq1k-nYM_LVNP1=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"called me back right away, gave me a fair quote promptly, did an analysis of my needs, gave me some advise which I appreciated, scheduled me in and did a great job in a timely fashion. The finished roof looks fantastic, and the attention to detail really stands out. Not only does it improve the appearance of my home, but I also feel confident in its durability and long-term performance.
I highly recommend Jacks Roofing to anyone looking for dependable service and excellent results. He will be our go-to company for our exterior needs!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCSwwCkJyNgaJRrg94HjI3p&fid=0x0:0x6ac5d27d5f4a213a"],"When":"2025-10-28"},{"Name":"Bob Young","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXeyXR9d7dtC03eHLIZs-UW1ZCho195RZ1JKruvtVKRT4EASl92=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It’s been about a week since the roofing pros from Bullarco completed our roofing project and there has been nothing but positive comments on the appearance of our new house topper from everyone coming to our home. It’s hard, no, impossible to miss because the house is 60’ below the driveway level, the first thing that you see is the roof. We are very happy with the completed project.

Chris, the straight forward manner that you conducted business made our decision to use your company our first choice. Glad we did. All materials used on our place was top quality and your pricing was fair. We appreciated the final walk around our property after the last screw was driven in, confirming we were satisfied with the results.

All of the men who worked on our site were professional, polite, friendly, knowledgeable and respectful to us and our home. They had to work on most of the hottest days this summer. You can’t hide from the sun working up top. I could easily tell from the conversations going on that they work as a team and were eager to do a proper job. Our personal thanks goes out to all the crew (and there were many) that worked on our project.

We would highly recommend Bullarco as the number one preferred roofing company to anyone looking for quality workmanship and materials for their roofing requirements.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhANzyF5TSztVHld8dImwOaG&fid=0x0:0x6ac5d27d5f4a213a"],"When":"2025-8-20"},{"Name":"Emily Wicks","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIiMdh_qCPF35MHEk2OGs3D8sQDyQ7VNtOpHW0v-4ZIUb3f8Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I can honestly say that my experience with Bullarco Inc was the best service I've ever received from a contractor. Chris with his Knowledge, understanding and honesty was fantastic through this whole process. Always transparent through the entire project letting us know if there were issues. He was always coming to site to check on the progress.

Ben and his Team are true artists and craftsmen. Their work is impeccable, attentive and beautiful. Very polite crew, no profanity and always saw them being safe. Everyone was tied to the roof. These conditions have not been great but somehow they completed my house safely and did a wonderful job. We are so Happy!

I would highly recommend them!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Carol Adams","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKL4dJ758gy9LVrPKcVp1eFbTRo7VXXKE9nzAwxwtNUd_PVcQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Chris and the crew at Bullarco provided fantastic service right from the quick response to our roofing inquiry to continuous updates to the clean up when the job was complete. Chris provided a quote and answered all of our questions to our satisfaction. A hard working crew, great product, attention to detail and safety all made this company a pleasure to work with. Highly recommend this company!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Charlotte Jewelers","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWDJp3UvQvQq9kp_sXySONZjKKG88amSjVzxLnRpiyPWFbBFZI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We recently experienced an unexpected roofing emergency and the team at Bullarco went above and beyond. From the moment we reached out, they demonstrated exceptional professionalism and urgency.

They arrived promptly, assessed the situation thoroughly, and immediately took action to prevent further damage—all while ensuring minimal disruption to our business operations. The quality of the work was outstanding, and the attention to detail gave us complete peace of mind.

We would highly recommend them to anyone in need of reliable, responsive roofing support!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Susan Vass","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW_rvyIvOyhnULzLyzVyUg4hE_10h4SxzSUfnua5qXyZqvNPXw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If I could give 10 stars I would...Id like to call Chris and Benny and their team the Roof Paramedics..We had an emergency and they got the job done with precision and great care..We had a Timber Frame shop erected with no roof and no walls due to permitting issues that landed us in some of Mother Nature's most challenging days. Bullarco waved a magic wand and did extra work outside the scope of their job description ...and worked right up until Christmas...so we could have the shop and Timbers saved from the elements and ready to work in:). The roof and siding looks spectacular.  Ive never seen such a large group of guys work so hard and so well together and with no "cell phone" distractions. Chris is always available to advise and guide and takes the stress out of any situation with his confidence and knowledge. Bennys installation experience, attention to detail and humble nature makes the team look like they are enjoying their craft. We also have a leak from a"Deck Tec" deck that has wreaked havoc on our homes interior so the Bullarco team will be back in the Spring to address that. They don't just do roofs:):):) Days after our project was completed my daughters new home ( not even moved in yet) freshly renovated and painted, sprung leaks from a one year old improperly installed steel roof and the Bullarco paramedics to the rescue once again.They de iced the home and put the bandaids on...That roof will have to be replaced in the Spring so do it right the first time with Bullarco's expertise. Thank you Bullarco team and Chris please let all the guys know how refreshing and what a great pleasure it is too see the care they take in their craft. With Gratitude Sue Vass and the 100 Acre Brewing Family:)","Images":null,"When":""}]

Love the look!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBha5HDbFYSvqbC5LQzqqGV&fid=0x0:0xefb8f083c1f18e0e"],"When":"2025-6-12"},{"Name":"Steven Wickens","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWIw4u8i5CmY2x18bF__Yp9aooiHlGSOMHv4huFMVO66BDBvI0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our old shingled roof was in pretty rough shape. I would highly recommend Gerard's product and installation team to anyone considering a roof replacement.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Linda Knight","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIUf4hzVTyu_8lBuu3G962_WE6AurCFAHEq6Bd4b44yz4nm2g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Gerard Canada is an outstanding metal roofing company. I took in my measurements and was met with an impressive showroom and very quick, attentive and knowledgeable people from the receptionist to Bob who walked me through my quote.
I was presented with an invoice and went on my merry way.  I received a call that my order was ready for pickup two days earlier than estimated.
Here is one of the better aspects of dealing with with Havelock Metal….they open at 7am 👍👍👍👍
I walked in, again met a by quick attentive receptionist who retrieved my invoice and directed me to their loading zone.  There I was met by a lot attended who was at my van before I could get out the door.
My order was retrieved, wrapped, labelled and strapped and with a little assistance from me, was loaded into my van.
Every part of dealing with Havelock Metal was a pleasure, and I let them know before I left.
I will definitely be back","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Wendy Knowlton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLY3utsnS7VXvxVVNTV9T4pU2QjQC_qqFctvxngJsJtVGGB-A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Thank you for the best customer service. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Tamer Kamar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUgPIg8qGoUzo5MacXlDUORCx20NhU8TQEsfMAmYGgRKDIS5GTj=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

As a real estate professional in Peterborough, I have had the privilege of working with numerous builders, but Dietrich Homes stands out as a premier choice for quality, design, and service. I have been selling Real Estate in Peterborough for over 22 years and I can absolutely tell you that in a City like Peterborough the secret to Success is caring for your clients and community. Paul Dietrich the owner of Dietrich Homes has been building homes and communities in Peterborough for over 40 years and even after that long his attention to detail and care for the communities he builds is unwavered. His personal mission for excellence and Superior brand quality is truly remarkable after so long in business and that is something I admire. As formal as my review may be I wanted to give you a personal touch here and let people know that this man truly takes Pride and shows Integrity in his business.

Construction Quality:
Dietrich Homes consistently exceeds expectations with their superior craftsmanship. Their homes are built to last, utilizing top-tier materials and construction practices that go beyond the Ontario Building Code.

Modern Finishes:
The interiors are thoughtfully designed with contemporary aesthetics, featuring spacious layouts, high-end fixtures, and energy-efficient systems. The attention to detail in every room reflects a commitment to luxury living.

Attention to Detail:
From coffered ceilings to custom walk-in closets, Dietrich Homes incorporates personalized touches that elevate the living experience. Their collaboration with skilled trades ensures each element is meticulously crafted.

Customer Service & Aftercare:
The "Dietrich Experience" is evident in their approach to customer care. They maintain open communication throughout the building process and continue to support homeowners after move-in, ensuring satisfaction and peace of mind.

Tamer Kamar

title: All Season's Roofing
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Greg Post","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLVO-nLugOFuyuUQznaWNBNn-6KT8Nc2wvhHmUTDd_QhmqG_w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Still waiting on our warranty paperwork for a new roof we had installed about three years ago. Paid cash the night the roof was completed and we've been ghosted ever since. We've called and emailed to get this information, to no avail. They actually did a great job and there's nothing wrong with the roof. Yet. Time to go to the BBB.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sajeev Sivayogarajah","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKENU-SmHyWtY29bI7BGqdXORIthHM3EVlATT8pw7FTn321MQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Man, I didn't want to do this, but they've forced my hand. This roofing and siding company is awesome and buddy-buddy with you until after they're paid by the contracting company. After that, they don't follow up when you have workmanship issues or requests for help. My insurance company (Intact-Belair) recommended me to use Paul Davis Peterborough, who used All-Seasons to repair some parts of my home, garage and shed. They did amazing work initially, but I kept noticing deficiencies here and there and they came and fixed those up. Now, recently, I noticed some siding at the back of my garage keeps sliding off and I also accidentally chipped my siding and I reached out to Paul Davis who said they'd contact All-Seasons - and nothing has happened. I tried calling All-Seasons myself, and no one answered. I left a voicemail and still nothing. I thought these guys were awesome, but they're just letting me down now. 1/10 for poor customer service. I don't think I'd recommend them to anyone else. C'mon guys. You know who I am. Give me a call.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ashley Colleen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL59kn6i4eIEEV-pRGZnisGH4g5oa4EZlGB389h2SxzXjTN6A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great company! Very knowledgeable crew showed up and took the time to clean up my property properly. Looked better when they left than when they arrived! Provided a competitive quote, quality shingles and work!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Twenty 2 Forty Gaming (CART-VR)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWK2QL2MwPMhvEkwuHec050E8BTTFVNLlQ__6oxGjy1KPm2Uwus=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Horrible...  They were referred to us by our insurance company.

They showed up for an estimate of our damage in regards to our claim and then nothing after that.

After 5 weeks of waiting they still did not provide us with an estimate, meanwhile we had an open leak coming into our roof that they knew about.

After reaching out via email and telephone there was no response.  They left us hanging full well knowing we intended to have the damage fixed immediately.

Once communicating with our insurance company we found out they are not going to give us an estimate.  No rhyme or reason, just an utter lack of professionalism and laziness.

If you intend on having any damage repaired or replaced look anywhere but All Seasons Roofing.  Incredibly unprofessional and an overall joke as a company.

I would not recommend them for anything, the damage they evaluated was not even relevant to the damage we filed our initial claim on.

They added work that did not need attention and intended on price gouging as it was an insurance claim.

It says a lot when the company your insurance team recommends does not even have the ability to answer they're phone or emails.

Horrible service, Horrible company.  Do not use All Seasons Roofing if you want your work completed in a timely manner or at all for that matter.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"William Mifflin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ-SDTS4grGZn8ErrxCgpEjgkVSu7diX6kvbW6zywAJnW1uTg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very impressed with the crew that did our roof. They were friendly, experienced, and completed the job efficiently and effectively. Team put in a lot of effort to clean up after and left the site/my home looking better than when they arrived.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Derek Taylor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK8er-0PRJsc7zmihpcyAlv-G7RZK20K83yalSX03lfCPO8ig=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very quick and reliable. Beat roofers in town. They also plow my driveway every year","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Leah Sampson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKqWEVzYTSwTy2EAYqhpWeGGb0XDJZvvodxd9mlI7R_TegoixU=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Reliable, dependable, detailed, and fair pricing!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"905 Flips","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVoioewEI532skmUhJtT7RTkh8_t5PMu7bd0Tii5k0GA0hd9Lg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Samantha MacDonald","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLfbnHwvpYBUW1giX9SnNGFErGhdgTbrpnLFWmBzp8SDBuMlA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Bad customer service! Don't stand behind their installs!!! Guess they are like other companies out there now. Had brand new eavestrough installed on 4 townhouses.  My back eaves is dripping over, a foot from my foundation and icicles all over too. I have lived here 8 years and this has never happened. My first contact was last week in December. I have sent numerous pictures of the situation too.Three weeks later Corey came out and said yah it's all frozen and that was it. No solution nothing was done. Eventually I emailed Chase Curtis who passed it on to John on Jan 16 and I have heard nothing. This doesn't include the phone call and numerous emails in between. Guess they don't care if it ruins my shingles or roof either. Maybe it will help if I post this everywhere possible so the next person doesn't hire them.
Still waiting !
After about 6 months and this review they came out again....Apparently they added more screws fixed the cracked eaves and caulked the whole eavestrough!
It would appear to be fine now. I guess this winter or some heavy rain will be the true test of a job well done, eventually!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCoy564Sg&fid=0x0:0x2caeb2bfb56870f3"],"When":"2025-4-19"},{"Name":"Nathan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIs1XF96cWsNZA60UyiiSPoptTpE2sl0GXgSSUd6xWqH9nl6Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My home wasn’t the only thing improved. I was able to improve upon myself. H- humble O -Optumituc M- Mellow E- Excercise. Thank you guys. Love you!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sharon Harper","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ7hmGbGCeg6XmjcWdQrzXFY8hZx7P5-yVK2uy_If4Zat12QA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I will never deal with Alf Curtis again. I was more than a year trying to get two windows replaced under warranty in my front door. Since someone didn't measure properly the windows did not fit when the installer tried to install them.  Alf Curtis had a dispute with the manufacturer and never replaced my windows. They left me high and dry not knowing how to move forward on getting this job completed. Very unprofessional and they certainly do not care about their customers.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"K S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXltOtGd6JhWC4zR8jgmJ3pll9BKlptBsMcBXzWsOjlE1JoBZ3l=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Chase,Jason,Brian and the whole team at Alf Curtis, not forgetting the guys helping load in the yard and the patient lady in the stock shed helping with all the nails and screws.
Thank you for all your help in making my project a success.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Collie 2023","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLZynG2aUKycTUf27rsohoxT0PIczXuMOuQuIJSwMoEaSaUOoXM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"WOW!!  I reviewed this business last year  but we just had them back to do more work - and they sent more AWESOME stars who are top of their game!!  Shouts out to Marshall and Steve who did all of our aluminum replacement work - these two are so FABULOUS at what they do - cannot say enough good things - AND they are super nice guys to boots!! John and Corey have been terrific - everyone here works as a team and the customer is the WINNER!!  FIVE stars for Alf Curtis - and it’s all because of their AMAZING staff!!  We had windows and door and aluminum work done, and they NAILED it - pardon the pun!  Chris has been just great - helped us choose products, is a brilliant communicator - I had many questions, and Chris always got back to me extremely fast and with answers!  Tyler Whitman and Mitch (sorry I didn’t catch Mitch’s last name) were FABULOUS!!  They worked so hard - amazing work ethic and extremely skilled - and fantastic with the client - so kind and polite and smart!! The quality of their work is outstanding!! They cleaned up so well before they left at the end of our job.  Thank you to all 3 of you, for exceeding our expectations!! We are so happy!!  And, last but not least, getting to meet and have a visit with Sadie - Mitch’s new puppy - was a great bonus!! 🙏🏻⭐️😊","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"D Davidge","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKgMixOWXSiBtTxiD5oWMDQtcfhw3h56UKi-qajTvUxoN2mcQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I will add my name to the list of disappointed  and frustrated customers. I am still waiting for materials to arrive for my contractor to do the work on our home. Poor communication and empty promises of delivery are still happening at this location.
I do not blame my contractor but the staff and owner.  We have been promised delivery of materials a couple of weeks ago.  They took our money  quickly enough. The last communication was "we won't have a truck available for another week to pick these materials up from Milton.
Be honest and do some advance planning when you take the money  plan to have a vehicle to retrieve the articles. There are real people at the end of this process expecting courtesy. Sure unexpected delays happen  but reading your reviews listed I am not the only one disappointed  and a sad pattern  of disappointment and dissatisfaction has emerged.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jesse Wheeler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIcTQ8t2Y95ZJE_CVCiFKQeR3sZh7hAyBLcY_jQSJ-XfgzYsw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Three No-Shows
I had previously received excellent service from Alf Curtis for window installations, so chose them over a comparably-priced competitor for a window replacement this year.  Unfortunately, my experience fell far short of expectations. The installers didn't show up on the first date of installation, even after I called about it and was told they were on the way.  They also didn't show up TWICE on later dates when they were supposed to come to fix an issue with the install.  Each time they no-showed, it was me who had to reach out to try to rebook - it was almost as if no one was aware that they weren't showing up?  But I would think that after the first time, it wouldn't happen two more times.  Only after speaking to management, 5 weeks after the original no-show, did we finally get the issue resolved. So because of absent communication, no-shows, and slow resolution, I will unfortunately have to look elsewhere for my next project.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Phillip Albert","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXiD5T9wXh5E1HXxRBogt1NRhpYKa1smCM2VVGLJw8a1I34-4gS=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I bought some product that was on clearance, which was final sale but it never left their yard so Chase Curtis allowed me to get a refund anyways. Super great guy and company, hats off to their business","Images":null,"When":""}]

title: Hill Quality Roofing
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Lindsay O'Brien","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVAypMGQSDofo__AztLcT9xXVh4SK1Cu7vkj3OJr3v3AkJRSRJ5=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Had Josh come out to replace my eaves troughs and facia. 2 corners were leaking and wanted to upgrade the colour as well.
Now my eaves troughs leak everywhere. They are horrible. The seams and screw holes all leak. The eaves dont even sit tight to the house so water pours between the house and eaves trough...the feont of the house they didnt even make the eaves trough long enough to reach the end of the shingle and the fascia isnt flat...
He's promised many times to send someone out who never shows up.
Hes never bothered to show up himself to address or fix any of it.

The Initial quote for my whole house was for 40 feet - I questioned this, knowing there's no way my whole home is only 40 square feet - Josh had to come back out to re-measure after I pointed this out. Turns out he read the wrong side of his tape measure - which really should have been where i ended things.

Also when i found they'd finished the installation they'd left cigarette butts throughout my yard, Tim's cups, beer cans and handfuls of nails and screws throught my lawn, walkway and driveway. Als found chunks of cut metal fascia left in the yard.

They broke a piece of my siding, and went into my neighbours yard without permission, and broke one their solar lights - so I had to hesr about that and apologize on their behalf...

Very unimpressed. Initially recommend as he was much cheaper than most in the area and had availability right away, but you get what you pay for I guess. And this guy does not know eaves troughs or fascia at all.

Will be looking to hire someone else to now fix his work.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDR48-AXw&fid=0x0:0xaa95fd0ef654192b"],"When":"2023-5-2"},{"Name":"daniel shattuck","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKa090obbUn0ax72_pUmt_vT_tYO2oxhWfGNNF7xCFXEgs-JQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Did a great job and were very easy to deal with. [{"Name":"Jessica Yates","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXhrP2l4SuVXnoU8GNC6ZE_P5XSfiqHmsL-TpaSHMo6QQ_qA2fXMQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Munro’s Drywall has been fantastic to work with. He has done great work for me and for my clients, and everyone I’ve referred has been really happy with the results.

On a recent project, I got multiple quotes, and Munro’s quote was the most reasonable and felt the most honest and realistic. The pricing made sense, and the communication was clear.

I’ve actually known him from back in the day and have watched him build his business from the ground up. It’s been really impressive to see the growth over the years, and it shows in the quality of work he delivers.

Highly recommend.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"amanda ferguson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKturdItlybrKmHaICuRTk9oiPmr1yeimJpukiw0AceSBwQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The two stars (instead of one) is for the service their office manager Kim provided. I’m appreciative that she answered the phone and helped us as much as she could.

The workmanship and timeline was a bad experience. In the end we gave up and asked for discounts from the original quote instead of asking them to fix any more mistakes.

There is a severe communication issue. I told Steve Munro things we wanted and they were never communicated to his team. Took two months to partially renovate 4 rooms (no flooring or paint).

Cherry on top was a boot footprint left on our bedsheets.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jamie Laxdal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK6e5TcL7fZ3U6oEBOVakDtjacy4EX4C3iBINtxmIgP1qZmWw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Clean up could have been better from mudding and taping or prevention of the mess at that.  it was insane how much of a mess was left behind. But more so we didn't notice how badly the flooring and underlay was laid (for the second time) until we had to pull it all up a month later due to our hot water tank leaking and it all seeped through. We weren't there to watch them step by step as we were at work. Underlay was a patch work job at best and not taped in most parts. Rendering the waterproofing of the underlay useless.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"H B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIBRC_h5W6I7DjyfOZ_C87Xik4H7-5-FbZiFAQYaBUYUILz1w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Save yourself the headache. Absolutely the worst experience having Munro’s renovate our basement.  The door to our house was constantly left open whether they were working in the basement or out in the garage (not going in and out, i.e. bringing material in and out as that would be understandable), they were smoking in our garage, stinking up our house, and also putting our cats at risk of getting outside. Cigarette butts left all over our driveway that we had to clean up. The ‘cleaner’ left the house door and garage door open and left the property one day. They used our freezer as a tool bench, leaving behind huge amounts of sawdust that we had to request be cleaned up, along with all of their coffee cups littered all over our house and property. We had to constantly follow up with the office to see if anyone was showing up to do work and to request work be completed adequately. Munro’s workers and subcontractors (other than the amazing plumbers) all had to come back at least twice to fix their original work. To top it off we were given a 4 week timeline, and it took over 4 months. They blame it on the extra work we requested but their crews worked from 10am-2pm, with multiple smoke breaks and of course their lunch break, before calling it quits each day (I work part time and come home for lunch so I could monitor), and there was AT LEAST 12 days when no one even showed up causing our dogs to be crated for no reason at times. Twice in month three the foreman, Frank, said they would be complete which they weren’t, text messages as proof of this. The owner, Steve, said we threatened him when we said we had a problem with the final bill. Photos include all of the cigarette butts we had to clean up, and the quality of work they tried to provide. The biggest take aways - Steve, the owner, gives great lip service but can’t back up with quality service.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDXkteadA&fid=0x0:0xb9ac13e39f7dcf8c"],"When":"2024-10-25"},{"Name":"Dan Jeeva","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLfjkQAdVTn5lonsNpYwr8jIEJyBmjF24LtFn3-jhyEIvNbiA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently completed a legal basement renovation with Munro Drywall, and the experience exceeded my expectations. From our first conversation to the final walkthrough, the entire team showed professionalism, honesty, and attention to detail that’s not always easy to find. They communicated clearly, respected timelines, and were always upfront about costs and expectations. Their consistency gave me confidence throughout the process.

A major strength of Munro Drywall is how well the team works together. Everyone played an important role, and the project felt well-coordinated from start to finish. That said, I’d like to recognize a few people who made a real difference during the renovation.

Frankie, the project lead, played a key role in the success of the project. He managed everything with focus, technical skill, and a calm, steady presence—even when we hit minor bumps along the way. He was regularly on-site, punctual, and attentive to both the quality and timeline of the work. He answered every question I had and always followed through on what he promised.

One of the most valuable things Frankie brought was his understanding of the permit process. With his help, I successfully obtained the building permit. His familiarity with both construction and municipal requirements saved us time and reduced stress. Beyond that, he was approachable and respectful, which made communication smooth and productive.

Frankie’s leadership brought a steady, reliable rhythm to the project. Beyond his technical knowledge and professionalism, what stood out was his ability to anticipate potential issues before they became problems. He maintained a clean, organized worksite, which spoke volumes about his respect for the space and overall work ethic. His consistent presence and clear communication made it easy to stay informed and confident throughout the process.

Kim, who managed the office side, was also incredibly helpful. She was organized, kind, and responsive. Whether it was scheduling crews, answering questions, or handling paperwork, she stayed on top of things. Her communication was always calm and professional, and her patience was appreciated whenever changes came up. It was clear she cared about the experience going well for me. Kim consistently made sure all my questions were answered thoroughly and patiently, which helped me feel supported throughout the process. Her friendly and approachable nature made working with the office team a truly positive experience.

Steve, the owner, brought valuable leadership and experience. It was clear his direction shaped the way the team worked—efficiently and with purpose. He offered practical, cost-effective guidance and stayed focused on getting things done the right way, without pushing unnecessary extras. His straightforward approach helped build trust.

Melissa supported us during material selection and helped make that process efficient. She responded quickly and helped ensure our choices matched the project goals. Thanks to her, that phase stayed on track and stress-free.

In the end, Munro Drywall delivered more than just a legal basement—they delivered a clean, well-built space that feels like a true extension of the home. It’s fully functional, up to code, and built with care.

Renovations can be stressful, but Munro Drywall made this feel manageable and well-organized. The team was consistently respectful, communicative, and accountable.

If you’re planning a basement or renovation—especially one involving permits—I highly recommend Munro Drywall. They’re professional, reliable, and focused on quality. Thanks again to Frankie, Kim, Steve, Melissa, and the rest of the team for your thoughtful work throughout the project.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jim Varden","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKlOuvooMJUXRsIhY41dSma8coXKZ6ukK85i8nk_R9qZKNyeA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Just have to say from the beginning phone call to Kim for a quote and to the finished work I have to say the company was very professional. The quality of work done was excellent. The crew that came to complete the job were very professional and always made sure to leave my house as clean as they found it. Casey was very knowledgeable and great at communicating everything that they were doing and was always ready to address any questions or concerns we had. All in all a great experience with this company. Would recommend them in a heartbeat. Thanks for a great experience all around.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marion Cam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJY4o0fuRwUCgWDiHRJRFBiGgRi-FM9QVRJ58q7R_8SOiVrtw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a great bunch of people. Right from my first phone call with Kim to set up an appointment to have someone come out to speak with us and prepare a quote. Casey arrived right on time and was very pleasant and easy to deal with.  Travis our drywall guy is a master of his trade.  He was always making sure that everything was perfect and returned until he felt the job was perfect.  Codie finished up with the primer and again, Three Cheers.  Steve has a great crew here and they work till the job is done.  Thanks again to Kim for all your help setting up the times and phone calls.  As a first time to ever use Contractor’s we picked a good one","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Leah Ramage","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWBd2G00JN490YbVkjL6-pp6PZOTVuo3QjRLjvbi4JHqPoWuRmA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"As a property manager, I have worked with a lot of contractors. Munro's is the first company that I found to be deeply professional, committed to doing good work and genuinely caring about their clients. Besides a few communication hiccups, I have been very pleased with my experience. I am already contacting Munro's for other renovation projects. Thank you for your professionalism, integrity and care!","Images":null,"When":""}]

We had a stressful situation with a roof leak that was coming into our main floor living area and down into the basement. Ryan responded quickly and approached the problem strategically, removing snow from a roof valley where he suspected the water was entering.

Even with continued melting, he was able to stop the leak using careful caulking, skill, and a whole lot of muscle. His honesty, timely response, strong work ethic, and genuine kindness truly stood out.

We’re incredibly grateful for his help and can’t wait to have him back in the spring for a more permanent fix. Ryan and BDR Contracting were amazing — 5 stars plus all the way!
Dave and Giny","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Elizabeth Derrett","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUFOnazXpejsH5RsbPyvLcOk8GEgTFj4bw0NzCbo_6V7V5GaAdz=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Highly recommend BDR Contracting!

This past spring, our roof suddenly started leaking and Ryan was quick to respond. He gave us a quote right away and talked us through the best material options for our roof’s design and different pitches. Within a week, we had the perfect stretch of weather and his crew got to work.

They arrived early, set up tarps all around the house to catch debris, and even dismantled our old unused brick chimney (something we’d planned to tackle ourselves) — all included in the quote which was very affordable. By that afternoon, the old roof was completely stripped and the new one installed.

Communication was excellent, service was top-notch, and we were impressed by the spotless cleanup — we never found a single stray nail or scrap in our yard or driveway.
